calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Continued To Apr-24-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SCOTT HELLER, HELLER JEWELERS, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

Defendants Scott Heller and Heller Jewelers, Inc.'s motion to transfer venue of this action to the Superior Court of California, County of Contra Costa is granted. The proper court for the trial of this action is Contra Costa County, the residence of both Defendants, and the county in which the alleged contract was entered into, was to be performed, and was allegedly breached. (Code Civ. Proc. Secs. 395(a), 395.5.) A cause of action for defamation or slander is not an action "for injury to person" within the meaning of Section 395(a). (Graham v. Mixon (1917) 177 Cal. 88, 93; see also Carruth v. Superior Court (1978) 80 Cal.App.3d 215, 217-218 [action for malicious prosecution is not one "for injury to person" as provided under section 395, and fact that plaintiff sought emotional distress damages did not alter that conclusion].) Within five days, Plaintiff's counsel Anthony A. Ferrigno shall pay Defendants' reasonable expenses in bringing the motion in the amount of $60, plus the processing change of venue fee of $40 and $435 for the initial filing fee. (Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 396b(b).) The Court finds that an offer to stipulate to change of venue was reasonably made and rejected, and that Plaintiff's counsel did not act in good faith in selecting the venue originally or in opposing the motion. Defendants' request for an award of reasonable attorneys' fees is denied in light of their failure to support that request with a proper declaration showing the number of hours spent preparing the motion or the reasonable hourly rates charged by counsel.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
